---
title: "Joseph Settimi"
---

::: {.hero-subtitle}
Sports writing. Data visualization. R code. Looking for signal in the noise.
:::

<input type="text" class="search-bar" placeholder="Search articles...">

<div style="display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; flex-wrap: wrap;">
<button class="filter-btn active">All</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Interactive</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Essay</button>
<button class="filter-btn">Analysis</button>
</div>

<p class="section-label">Featured</p>

::: {.featured-grid}

::: {.featured-card}
<div class="featured-card-cover">📊</div>
<div class="featured-card-content">
<div class="tag tag-interactive">Interactive</div>
### Wemby
Shot patterns and offensive flow in the Finals.
</div>
:::

::: {.featured-card}
<div class="featured-card-cover">✍️</div>
<div class="featured-card-content">
<div class="tag tag-essay">Essay</div>
### The Dusty May Moratorium
Championship ghosts and unfinished business.
</div>
:::

:::

::: {.stats-section}
::: {.stats-grid}

::: {.stat-item}
**2**

Articles
:::

::: {.stat-item}
**∞**

Graphs
:::

::: {.stat-item}
**1**

Author
:::

:::
:::

<p class="section-label">Interactive</p>

## Graphs & Visualizations

<p class="section-description">R-powered explorations of sports data.</p>

::: {.graphs-grid}

::: {.graph-card}
<p class="label">Interactive</p>
#### OVD Explorer
:::

::: {.graph-card}
<p class="label">Visualization</p>
#### Shot chart comparison
:::

::: {.graph-card}
<p class="label">Analysis</p>
#### Deep dives
:::

::: {.graph-card}
<p class="label">Exploration</p>
#### Player trends
:::

:::

::: {.cta-section}
### More writing

See all posts, graphs, and data explorations.

[View all →](posts.html){.btn-dark}
:::

::: {.footer}
Joseph Settimi © 2026
:::
